title: RunnerResultReport
description: Typed advisory terminal result report from untrusted runner to broker.

lifecycle_state.description: Runner terminal lifecycle projected into broker lifecycle vocabulary.

idempotency_key.description: Stable idempotency key for runner terminal replay safety.

stage_id.description: Stable stage identity when terminaling at stage scope.

step_id.description: Stable step identity when terminaling at step scope.

role_instance_id.description: Stable role-instance identity when terminaling at role scope.

stage_attempt_id.description: Stage attempt identity for retry/recovery tracking.

step_attempt_id.description: Step attempt identity for retry/recovery tracking.

gate_attempt_id.description: Gate attempt identity when result is gate-scoped.

failure_reason_code.description: Optional normalized failure reason code when lifecycle_state=failed.

details.description: Optional bounded advisory result details without canonical broker authority.
